description: CompositionBlack formal trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, brand badge above the right pocket, loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, and a zipper and button closureFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironCrafted from 100% cotton, this pair of chinos from the arrow Ultimo collection is lightweight, comfortable and comes with wrinkle-free qualities that makes it easy to maintain. The fine tailoring ensures an excellent Fit, offering a flattering silhouette and making it a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 41.5"Height: 6.1; Waist: 31"
